objectives.title: Smoke Objective
constraints: No unrelated changes

objectives.title: Post Patch Objective
constraints: Constraint A

objectives.title: Array Return Fix Objective
constraints: Constraint X

objectives.title: Upgrade TOD into a repository-aware programming orchestrator
objectives.description: Build engineering memory, repo indexing, context-rich packaging, review intelligence, and method-improvement loops.
constraints: MIM remains durable source of truth
Do not break existing bridge actions
success_criteria: TOD can attach relevant context to packaged tasks
TOD can review returned code against scope and acceptance criteria
TOD can improve packaging based on prior results

objectives.title: Make TOD repository-aware and engineering-memory capable.
objectives.description: Upgrade TOD from workflow engine to repository-aware, engineering-memory-capable software orchestrator.
constraints: MIM remains durable source of truth
Preserve existing bridge behavior
success_criteria: TOD can attach repo context to packaged tasks

objectives.title: Implement MIM-TOD synchronization manifest and drift detection
objectives.description: Build a synchronization spine between MIM and TOD with manifest publishing, drift detection, repo-change reindex triggers, and journaling of sync outcomes.
constraints: Preserve existing TOD-MIM bridge compatibility
No destructive schema changes without versioning
Keep sync checks deterministic and auditable
success_criteria: Manifest includes system version contract version repo signature schema version capabilities and recent changes
TOD detects repo changes and triggers re-index
TOD logs sync state to MIM journal and local TOD logs

objectives.title: Contract gate test
objectives.description: Should be allowed when no breaking drift

objectives.title: Add pluggable execution-engine support to TOD
objectives.description: Introduce provider-independent execution architecture so TOD can run Codex now and alternate engines later without workflow rewrites.
constraints: Preserve existing TOD-MIM behavior
Execution engines must emit structured results
Do not break current packaging/review flows

tasks.title: Add engineering memory model
tasks.scope: Implement persistent engineering memory buckets and access commands.
acceptance_criteria: Notes can be added and queried

tasks.title: Add repo indexer
tasks.scope: Scan repository, summarize structure, and persist index snapshots.

tasks.title: Add module summary generator
tasks.scope: Derive module-level summaries from indexed repository metadata.
acceptance_criteria: Module summaries available for task packaging context

tasks.title: Upgrade task packaging schema
tasks.scope: Add richer package sections including architecture/context/validation commands/escalation triggers.
acceptance_criteria: Packaging v2 template contains required sections

tasks.title: Add result-review rule engine
tasks.scope: Evaluate scope compliance, test evidence, architecture/risk checks, and suggest pass/revise/escalate.
acceptance_criteria: Rule-based review output includes decision rationale

tasks.title: Persist packaging lessons into MIM
tasks.scope: Capture post-task reflections and store lessons via bridge-compatible flow.

tasks.title: Implement repository index + module summary generation for the MIM codebase.
tasks.scope: Build repository index and module summary generation with persisted outputs consumable by TOD packaging/review flows.
acceptance_criteria: Packaging V2 can include module context

tasks.title: Add MIM manifest model and endpoint
tasks.scope: Define manifest response model in MIM and expose /manifest endpoint.
acceptance_criteria: Manifest schema is documented and versioned

tasks.title: Include repo signature and contract version in manifest
tasks.scope: Compute and publish repo signature and contract version in manifest payload.
acceptance_criteria: Values are deterministic across unchanged repos

tasks.title: Compare live manifest vs TOD cached sync state
tasks.scope: Implement manifest diffing between live MIM state and TOD cached sync state.

tasks.title: Add re-index trigger logic
tasks.scope: Trigger TOD repo re-index when manifest repo signature differs from cached sync state.
acceptance_criteria: Re-index result is attached to sync outcome

tasks.title: Log drift and sync outcomes
tasks.scope: Write sync and drift outcomes to MIM journal and local TOD logs/state.
acceptance_criteria: Sync outcomes are logged to MIM journal
Sync outcomes are logged locally with timestamp
Logs include drift type and reconciliation action

tasks.title: Gate override test
tasks.scope: contract gate override test

tasks.title: Add POST /journal endpoint support on MIM
tasks.scope: Implement MIM POST /journal for structured sync and lifecycle events, and expose it in OpenAPI.
acceptance_criteria: Journal entries persist durably in MIM

tasks.title: Define ExecutionEngine interface
tasks.scope: Define a stable execution engine contract (input/output/lifecycle hooks) for TOD task execution.

tasks.title: Implement CodexExecutionEngine
tasks.scope: Implement Codex-backed execution engine using existing TOD packaging/result structures.
acceptance_criteria: Codex engine returns structured result payload

tasks.title: Add engine selection config
tasks.scope: Add TOD config for selecting active execution engine and defaults.

tasks.title: Store execution engine metadata in results and journal
tasks.scope: Persist engine name/version/decision metadata on task results and journal entries.
acceptance_criteria: Metadata is available in local and remote paths

tasks.title: Prepare placeholder LocalExecutionEngine
tasks.scope: Create a provider-independent local execution engine stub for future implementation.

tasks.title: Harden semantic acceptance matching in review-result-v2
tasks.scope: Make review-result-v2 evaluate acceptance criteria semantically (including semicolon-delimited criteria) so equivalent evidence passes without exact phrase matching.
acceptance_criteria: Unsatisfied criteria only include genuinely missing evidence

tasks.title: Implement Invoke-ExecutionEngine orchestration in TOD
tasks.scope: Select active engine from config, apply fallback when needed, pass package path and task metadata, and normalize returned result envelope.
acceptance_criteria: Fallback path works when active engine unavailable or fails

tasks.title: Implement CodexExecutionEngine wrapper
tasks.scope: Define the concrete engine wrapper for package-path input, capture execution output, and emit normalized execution result.
acceptance_criteria: Package file can be submitted through engine wrapper
Output normalized into TOD result schema

tasks.title: Add execution result normalization and review precheck
tasks.scope: Normalize engine output fields and run pre-review sanity checks before review decisions.

tasks.title: Add run-task TOD action
tasks.scope: Add single-command task run path: package task, invoke configured engine, record result in MIM, and record execution lifecycle in journal.
acceptance_criteria: Single command executes full task run path

tasks.title: Add engine performance memory
tasks.scope: Track per-engine success rate, task types handled, fallback frequency, and escalation rate for future routing decisions.
acceptance_criteria: Future routing can use historical data

tasks.title: Add adaptive engine routing policy
tasks.scope: Select execution engine using historical performance metrics before invocation, while preserving explicit fallback behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Policy decision is observable in execution_engine output
Policy can auto-switch from weak/no-history engine to stronger engine

tasks.title: Add force-configured-engine override
tasks.scope: Add a switch to bypass adaptive pre-selection and force configured active engine path while preserving normal fallback semantics.
acceptance_criteria: Override switch bypasses adaptive routing pre-selection
Override behavior is observable in execution attempts

tasks.title: Add concise run-task report action
tasks.scope: Add a lightweight reporting action that emits engine path, fallback, result id, review decision, and performance delta for a task.

tasks.title: Persist engine performance history to engineering memory
tasks.scope: Update per-engine performance stats on each run and persist durable engine-performance snapshots into engineering memory.
acceptance_criteria: Each run updates per-engine performance stats
Stats stored in durable TOD memory
Stats retrievable by engine and task type

tasks.title: Classify task execution type for routing
tasks.scope: Add inferred or explicit task_category values and use them for performance analysis.

tasks.title: Use historical engine performance in routing policy
tasks.scope: Consult stored per-engine stats in routing policy and deprioritize weak engines while keeping fallback and overrides.
acceptance_criteria: Fallback and ForceConfiguredEngine override remain intact

tasks.title: Enhance show-engine-performance action
tasks.scope: Expose concise per-engine summary with pass/revise/escalate, fallback frequency, trend, and category breakdown.
acceptance_criteria: Recent trend and category breakdown visible

tasks.title: Make routing decisions structured visible and persisted
tasks.scope: Persist structured routing decisions in TOD state, expose them in invoke/run outputs and reporting, and provide a query action for routing decision history.
acceptance_criteria: Routing decisions are stored in state with structured fields
invoke-engine and run-task outputs include routing decision details
show-routing-decisions action returns recent decision history

tasks.title: Persist routing decisions to memory and journal
tasks.scope: Persist routing decision details (selected/fallback/candidate engines, category, reason, confidence, final outcome) to TOD state, journal, and engineering memory.
acceptance_criteria: Routing decision details are persisted in TOD state
Journal entries include full routing decision record
Engineering memory stores routing decision records with final outcome

tasks.title: Add routing policy guardrails
tasks.scope: Add hard guardrails for placeholder restrictions, sync/contract risk, and repeated category failures; keep historical weighting sample-size aware.
acceptance_criteria: Placeholder engine blocked for code_change unless explicitly allowed
Execution is blocked/escalated on contract drift breaking status
Engines with repeated recent category failures are avoided or blocked
History weighting is advisory under low sample sizes
